creator: kenorb@gmail.com
text:
just read: man ipnat
Code:

FILES
       /dev/ipnat
       /usr/share/examples/ipf  Directory with examples.

This directory is invalid.
Code:

> ls /usr/share/examples/ipf
ls: /usr/share/examples/ipf: No such file or directory


The correct should be: /usr/share/examples/ipfilter

See: http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=19193
